caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a navy blue baseball cap with a gold emblem, and over-ear headphones speaks into a professional studio microphone. He is wearing a gold chain with a pendant. In the background, a white wall features a logo that says "HUSTLE" above several black stars. To his right, large red and black text reads "BOSS TALK 101". On the lower left of the screen, a logo reads "BOSS TALK PODCAST", and another "BOSS TALK 101" logo appears on the lower right. The man's t-shirt has "CHECK IT!" printed on it in white text. Across the sequence, the man maintains a similar posture and facial expression, speaking toward the microphone with slight shifts in his head position and mouth movements, indicating an ongoing conversation in a podcast studio setting.
